title: Africa's Hunters
desc: A younger and stronger leopard challenges Kamuti for her territory in the Luangwa Valley, where she has reigned for ten years.

title: Hot Life Africa
desc: Leopards live in all kinds of ecosystems, from the humid jungles of India to the driest regions of Africa. They can adapt to almost any climate and feed on over 100 different species.

title: Lion Country: Night and Day
desc: Groundbreaking series that follows the lives of two lion families in the Zambian bush. The prides clash when they find that their territories are overlapping.

title: Great Parks of Africa
desc: In the centre of South Africa is an ancient landscape that was once an inland sea. Now it is a mosaic of unique habitats. Life here has evolved ingenious solutions to survive. There is nowhere in South Africa quite like the Karoo National Park.

title: Great Species of Africa
desc: Scavengers, like vultures and hyenas, are some of the most misunderstood animals. The crew uncover surprising facts that make vultures and hyenas incredible and indispensable creatures in their own right.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
desc: In the Kruger National Park in South Africa, Dianne finds a boomslang and a chameleon in a duel on the tar road. Not an environment where they would encounter each other under any normal circumstances.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
desc: A showcase of some of wildlife's most remarkable moments, caught on film by amateurs and professionals. We reveal the full spectrum of animal behaviour: the brutal, the beautiful and the bizarre. Each moment is explained by experts in the field.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
desc: A showcase of some of wildlife's most remarkable moments, caught on film by amateurs and professionals. We reveal the full spectrum of animal behaviour: the brutal, the beautiful and the bizarre. Each moment is explained by experts in the field.

title: River Monsters
desc: When a sea monster washes up on an English beach, Jeremy Wade sets off to unmask the beast. His journey takes him to the ice sheets of Greenland and Norway.

title: Wild Cats
desc: Explores the daily activities of predatory wild cats residing in the forests of America while capturing their unseen intimacy with their families.

title: A Wild Year On Earth
desc: It's the start of the year. Arctic winds plunge the polar bear into a de freeze, while in Australia, the heat means a feast for one bird prey.

title: The Big Dry
desc: The drought in the Luangwa valley strengthens due to a global El Nino event. There has been no rain since April and desperate animals are drawn to the only source of water left in the valley, the Luangwa River.

title: Arabian Inferno
desc: The Arabian landscape is a virtually waterless desert where rain scarcely falls and animals endure blistering temperatures. But for 3 months every year, a remote region on the south west coast undergoes an astonishing transformation... into a lush, verdant oasis.

title: Great Parks of Africa
desc: In the centre of South Africa is an ancient landscape that was once an inland sea. Now it is a mosaic of unique habitats. Life here has evolved ingenious solutions to survive. There is nowhere in South Africa quite like the Karoo National Park.

title: Great Species of Africa
desc: Scavengers, like vultures and hyenas, are some of the most misunderstood animals. The crew uncover surprising facts that make vultures and hyenas incredible and indispensable creatures in their own right.

title: River Monsters
desc: When a sea monster washes up on an English beach, Jeremy Wade sets off to unmask the beast. His journey takes him to the ice sheets of Greenland and Norway.

title: Wild Cats
desc: Explores the daily activities of predatory wild cats residing in the forests of America while capturing their unseen intimacy with their families.

title: The Big Dry
desc: The rains are late and it is the most brutal time of year. Babies born into drought face starvation. When the rain arrives, it is a downpour on an enormous scale and alien creatures emerge into a different world.

title: Africa's Hunters
desc: Three of the pride's lionesses go into labour, but new cubs bring with them big danger, as three strong males are plotting to destroy their world from across Zambia's Luangwe River.

title: Hot Life Africa
desc: Being thin, having black patches on light-coloured fur, hyperventilating and licking itself regularly to evaporate saliva are the cheetah's most effective tricks to cope with its scorching environment.

title: Lion Country: Night and Day
desc: Conclusion of the groundbreaking documentary series. As the rainy season approaches, the young cubs of both prides are put in jeopardy.

title: Great Parks of Africa
desc: In the southern reaches of Africa's great Kalahari basin, everything is made tough. Ancient rivers harbour water deep underground, and these hidden lifelines forge a fragile link to survival. This is the Kgalagadi Transfrontier Park.

title: Great Species of Africa
desc: The crew travel alongside a herd of elephants in the savanna and witness the journey of these creatures, who can travel up to 160 kilometres in a single day.

title: Attack of the Devil Shark
desc: It's time to dive deep into the ocean and get up close and personal with one of the world's deadliest predators and explore their secret lives.

title: Jungle Planet
desc: Cameras capture the beauty, diversity and richness of the world's forests and jungles.

title: River Monsters
desc: Jeremy Wade investigates a case in Nepal that sounds strangely familiar - a lone fisherman dragged off his feet and into a mountain river by the original river monster, the goonch catfish.

title: Wild Cats
desc: Explores the daily activities of wild cats in Asia, highlighting their heart-warming time with their families and dangerous hunting trails.

title: China's Wild Secrets
desc: In southwestern China, towering mountains provide shelter for nearly 2,000 wild giant pandas. Giant Panda National Park is three times the size of Yellowstone and is home to over 10,000 species.

title: The Big Dry
desc: The rains are late and it is the most brutal time of year. Babies born into drought face starvation. When the rain arrives, it is a downpour on an enormous scale and alien creatures emerge into a different world.

title: Air Jaws: The Hunt for Colossus
desc: A 20-foot great white breaches in New Zealand, sparking a hunt for Colossus, the flying shark who went missing 10 years ago from South Africa's waters; could he still be alive and lead researchers to a secret colony of lost great whites?

title: Wild Cats
desc: Explores the daily activities of predatory wild cats residing in the forests of America while capturing their unseen intimacy with their families.
